items.title: Train/val/test splits
items.description: Early stopping requires a labeled validation partition that never enters fit() — the split design and locked-test discipline live in Train/Val/Test Splits; this topic consumes validation rows as the feedback channel.

items.title: Tracking metrics
items.description: Split-prefixed metrics (val/loss, val/f1) logged each epoch form the validation curves that early stopping monitors — consistent naming and logging practices are defined in Tracking Metrics.

items.title: Gradient descent
items.description: Neural networks and other iterative optimizers update parameters each step via gradient descent; early stopping wraps that loop by evaluating validation performance after each epoch and halting when improvement stalls.

items.title: Gradient boosting
items.description: Sequential tree boosting monitors validation loss each round — libraries expose early_stopping_rounds and best_iteration; the general patience-and-restore pattern is canonical here, while boosting-specific APIs are covered in Gradient Boosting.

items.title: Overfitting mitigation
items.description: Early stopping limits training duration when validation performance peaks — one practical regularizer alongside weight decay, dropout, and data augmentation in the overfitting mitigation family.
